name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES state, turn, flag, next
N == 5

(* Helper definitions *)
Idle == 0
Trying == 1
Critical == 2

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ state \in [1..N -> Idle]
        /\ turn \in 1..N
        /\ flag \in [1..N -> FALSE]
        /\ next \in [1..N -> 1..N]
        /\ \A p \in 1..N: next[p] = (p % N) + 1

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ \A p \in 1..N:
            /\ state[p] = Idle
            /\ flag[p] = TRUE
            /\ turn' = p
            /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = Trying]
        \/ \A p \in 1..N:
            /\ state[p] = Trying
            /\ flag[p] = TRUE
            /\ turn = p
            /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = Critical]
        \/ \A p \in 1..N:
            /\ state[p] = Critical
            /\ flag[p] = FALSE
            /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = Idle]
        \/ \A p \in 1..N:
            /\ state[p] = Trying
            /\ flag[p] = TRUE
            /\ turn # p
            /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = Idle]
        \/ \A p \in 1..N:
            /\ state[p] = Idle
            /\ flag[p] = FALSE
            /\ state' = state
        \/ \A p \in 1..N:
            /\ state[p] = Idle
            /\ flag[p] = FALSE
            /\ next' = [next EXCEPT ![p] = (p % N) + 1]
        \/ \A p \in 1..N:
            /\ state[p] = Idle
            /\ flag[p] = FALSE
            /\ next' = next

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn, flag, next>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {Idle, Trying, Critical}]
          /\ turn \in 1..N
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
          /\ next \in [1..N -> 1..N]
          /\ \A p \in 1..N: next[p] \in 1..N

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
Left(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
Right(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State predicates *)
ForkOwner(f) == [x \in 1..N |-> IF forks[x] = f THEN x ELSE 0]
PhilosopherState(i) == states[i]

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [x \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ states = [x \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ states[i] = "thinking"
                               /\ forks[Left(i)] = 0
                               /\ forks[Right(i)] = 0
                               /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
                               /\ forks' = forks
        \/ /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ states[i] = "hungry"
                               /\ forks[Left(i)] = 0
                               /\ forks[Right(i)] = 0
                               /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
                               /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Left(i)] = i, ![Right(i)] = i]
        \/ /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ states[i] = "eating"
                               /\ forks[Left(i)] = i
                               /\ forks[Right(i)] = i
                               /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
                               /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Left(i)] = 0, ![Right(i)] = 0]

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 0..N]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : forks[i] = 0 \/ forks[i] = i
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : states[i] \in {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

Init == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
        /\ head \in 1..K
        /\ tail \in 1..K
        /\ size \in 0..K
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0
        /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]

Producer == /\ size < K
           /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]
           /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
           /\ size' = size + 1
           /\ head' = head

Consumer == /\ size > 0
           /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]
           /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
           /\ size' = size - 1
           /\ tail' = tail

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Readers

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers :
              /\ r \in readers
              /\ readers' = Remove(r, readers)
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
              /\ \E r \in Readers :
                  /\ r \notin readers
                  /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
              /\ \E r \in Readers :
                  /\ r \in readers
                  /\ readers' = Remove(r, readers)
              /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, promises, accepts, chosen, chosenBy, chosenBallot, chosenByBallot, chosenValue, chosenBallotValue, chosenBallotValueBy
\* A ballot is a pair (n, p) where n is a natural number and p is a proposer ID
Ballot == [n: Nat, p: proposers]
\* A value is any element of the state
Value == [v: Nat]
\* A promise is a pair (ballot, value)
Promise == [b: Ballot, v: Value]
\* An accept is a pair (ballot, value)
Accept == [b: Ballot, v: Value]

\* TypeOK ensures all variables have correct types
TypeOK == 
  /\ acceptors \in SUBSET proposers
  /\ proposers \in SUBSET Nat
  /\ promises \in [acceptors -> [b: Ballot, v: Value]]
  /\ accepts \in [acceptors -> [b: Ballot, v: Value]]
  /\ chosen \in SUBSET Value
  /\ chosenBy \in [Value -> proposers]
  /\ chosenBallot \in [Value -> Ballot]
  /\ chosenByBallot \in [Ballot -> proposers]
  /\ chosenValue \in [Ballot -> Value]
  /\ chosenBallotValue \in [Ballot -> Value]
  /\ chosenBallotValueBy \in [Ballot -> proposers]

\* Initial state
Init == 
  /\ acceptors \in SUBSET proposers
  /\ proposers \in SUBSET Nat
  /\ promises \in [acceptors -> [b: Ballot, v: Value]]
  /\ accepts \in [acceptors -> [b: Ballot, v: Value]]
  /\ chosen \in SUBSET Value
  /\ chosenBy \in [Value -> proposers]
  /\ chosenBallot \in [Value -> Ballot]
  /\ chosenByBallot \in [Ballot -> proposers]
  /\ chosenValue \in [Ballot -> Value]
  /\ chosenBallotValue \in [Ballot -> Value]
  /\ chosenBallotValueBy \in [Ballot -> proposers]
  /\ \A a \in acceptors: promises[a] = [b: [n: 0, p: 0], v: [v: 0]]
  /\ \A a \in acceptors: accepts[a] = [b: [n: 0, p: 0], v: [v: 0]]
  /\ chosen = <<>>
  /\ chosenBy = [v \in Value |-> 0]
  /\ chosenBallot = [v \in Value |-> [n |-> 0, p |-> 0]]
  /\ chosenByBallot = [b \in Ballot |-> 0]
  /\ chosenValue = [b \in Ballot |-> [v |-> 0]]
  /\ chosenBallotValue = [b \in Ballot |-> [v |-> 0]]
  /\ chosenBallotValueBy = [b \in Ballot |-> 0]

\* Next-state relation
Next == 
  \E p \in proposers:
    \E a \in acceptors:
      \E b \in Ballot:
        \E v \in Value:
          /\ promises[a] = [b: b, v: v]
          /\ accepts[a] = [b: b, v: v]
          /\ chosen = chosen \cup <<v>>
          /\ chosenBy[v] = p
          /\ chosenBallot[v] = b
          /\ chosenByBallot[b] = p
          /\ chosenValue[b] = v
          /\ chosenBallotValue[b] = v
          /\ chosenBallotValueBy[b] = p

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers, promises, accepts, chosen, chosenBy, chosenBallot, chosenByBallot, chosenValue, chosenBallotValue, chosenBallotValueBy>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Sender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE
VARIABLES receivedChunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ file = <<>>
    /\ chunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = 0
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ receivedChunks = <<>>

Next ==
    /\ \E chunk \in Seq(CHUNK_SIZE) :
        /\ chunk \in file
        /\ chunk \notin sentChunks
        /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, chunk)
        /\ \E loss \in BOOLEAN :
            /\ loss = TRUE
            /\ receivedChunks' = receivedChunks
            /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
            /\ retransmitCount' <= MAX_RETRIES
        \/ loss = FALSE
            /\ receivedChunks' = Append(receivedChunks, chunk)
            /\ retransmitCount' = 0

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks, receivedChunks>>

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES clocks, offsets

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]]
          /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
        /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]]
          /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = \E j \in 1..N : j \in 1..N /\ j # i : (clocks[j] - clocks[i]) \div (N - 1)]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 2
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
        \/ /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 2
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = 1
        \/ /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = 2

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Client, Pages

VARIABLES free, allocated, c

Init == /\ free = {p \in Pages : p \in 1..N}
        /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == /\ free # {}
        /\ \E p \in free : /\ free' = free \ {p}
                           /\ \E c \in Client : /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
                                                /\ \E c' \in Client \ {c} : allocated'[c'] = allocated[c']

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Client : allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Client : allocated[c] \subseteq free
          /\ \A c1, c2 \in Client : c1 # c2 => allocated[c1] \cap allocated[c2] = {}

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants \in {0,1}^2
        /\ wants = [i \in {0,1} |-> 0]

Next == 
  \/ /\ turn = 0
      /\ wants[0] = 0
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![0] = 1]
      /\ turn' = 1
      /\ UNCHANGED <<wants[1]>>
  \/ /\ turn = 1
      /\ wants[1] = 0
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = 1]
      /\ turn' = 0
      /\ UNCHANGED <<wants[0]>>
  \/ /\ turn = 0
      /\ wants[0] = 1
      /\ UNCHANGED <<turn, wants>>
  \/ /\ turn = 1
      /\ wants[1] = 1
      /\ UNCHANGED <<turn, wants>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Node
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES counts

Init == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
       /\ \A n \in Node: counts[n] = [m \in Node |-> 0]

Next == /\ \A n \in Node: counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [m \in Node |-> counts[n][m] + 1]]
       \/ \A n, m \in Node: counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n][m] = Max(counts[n][m], counts[m][n])]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>
